subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants at the Holy Threshold! We have been greatly cheered and refreshed to know that ye have organized meetings for the education of children.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده آستان مقدس محافلی که از برای تربیت و تعلیم نورسیدگان ترتیب گردیده
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @education of children; moral education, @praise and encouragement
